comparisons.note: Best Qwen token edge appears at 1536, but remains non-decisive.

source.title: research: characterize qwen 4k sentence/token budget sweep

comparisons.note: Negative delta to vanilla is expected here because vanilla is already at ceiling.
Zero-discordance gate: no retention-policy discrimination on the shipped surface.
Ceiling gate: no retention-policy discrimination on the shipped surface.
At 2048, TOVA remains numerically above sentence, but the paired test is non-decisive.
Five one-sided discordant pairs is still p = 0.0625 under exact two-sided McNemar.

claims.summary: Mistral 4k sentence-level decisively outperforms token-level at budget 1024.

source.title: research: sentence-level vorn eviction budget sweep

claims.summary: Mistral 8k sentence-level wins in the mid-budget band (1024 and 1536), while 2048 remains non-decisive.

claims.summary: Qwen blocks any universal sentence-law claim, but the evidence is non-discriminative rather than strongly anti-sentence.

source.title: research: characterize qwen 4k sentence/token budget sweep

support.note: Best Qwen token edge appears at 1536, but remains non-decisive.
Zero-discordance gate: no retention-policy discrimination on the shipped surface.

claims.summary: Gemma 4 sits in a degradation regime: sentence improves over token but remains far below vanilla/TOVA/H2O on the tested slice.

support.note: Negative delta to vanilla is expected here because vanilla is already at ceiling.

claims.summary: Llama 3.1 functions as a threshold gate, not a discriminative retention comparison, on the tested 4k slice.

support.note: Ceiling gate: no retention-policy discrimination on the shipped surface.

claims.summary: The Gemma-vs-Llama mirror-image framing survives guardrail removal, but it is still not inferentially symmetric at n=50.

support.note: Five one-sided discordant pairs is still p = 0.0625 under exact two-sided McNemar.

claims.summary: Removing guardrails does not reveal a hidden reversal of the Gemma/Llama family split on the tested 1024 slice.

claims.summary: On Llama 3.1, the threshold cut below 1024 appears sharply in the attention-weight baselines, while sentence remains at ceiling and token remains near-ceiling.

claims.summary: Ministral 8B provides a strong fifth-family fast-read in the residual-preserving direction, but not yet a full family classification.
Word never wins in the observed regime table, but that remains an observed-regime statement, not a universal theorem.
